transcript.text:
I didn't even know Suwon had a Soondae Town
until today
- On weekends... we get like 1,000 people! - 1,000 people?
(1,000 people come for this soondae gopchang) But here, it comes as a hot pot
She's not the average customer...!
(Yep, she's different...!)
(Guess his wish (?) came true at Soondae Town)
Hi, everyone!
I'm here at Jidong Market in Suwon today
I heard there's a Soondae Town here
(Suwon has a Soondae Town too...?!) I didn't even know Suwon had a Soondae Town until today
This place is usually really crowded and famous
I came between lunch and dinner on a weekday
Wow, everything here is soondae!
(Soondae everywhere...!!!) It's all soondae
Seolleongtang, soondae, Soondae Gopchang Town

This is the entrance to Soondae Gopchang Town!!
Let's check it out
(This is where all the soondae gopchang places are)
All the spots here do soondae gopchang,
and they're all supposed to be good,
(At "Wonjomom," one of the top-reviewed spots) so I thought, "Anywhere should be fine"
I picked this place after checking some blog reviews
Once it's past 5, there's usually a line
- Really? - But it's raining today, so it's been quiet overall
Oh, 'cause of the rain today
- On weekends... we get like 1,000 people! - 1,000 people?
Around 1,400 just here
It's usually super crowded,
(Perfect timing… hehe) but I came right when it rained
(Can choose from 3 spice levels!) They've got mild, medium, and spicy
How many servings do you make at once?

- Up to four - Four servings at max?
- Yeah, gets risky after that - Got it
I'll get four orders of soondae gopchang stir-fry
Oh wait,
I didn't order a drink...
- That's on the house - The drink's free?
I refill everything in here evenly Gopchang, soondae, all of it
- You refill gopchang too? - Yeah,
I give a little if you ask
But no one really asks for unlimited refills or anything
Our concept is...
Everything gets refilled, except me
- Everything but me - Except you?
You don't need more of me, right? Haha
The owner's hilarious
That's that classic market generosity

Real market vibes…
(The soondae gopchang's finally here...) Thank you
Whoa, it's huge
Thank you
This looks amazing
This isn't stir-fried gopchang It feels more like a hot pot
You know the famous Sillim-dong Soondae Town?
They serve it stir-fried like baeksoondae there,
but here, it comes as a hot pot
Do I let this simmer down first?
Look at all these chives
Gotta cook the noodles
Let me spread them out
I'll start with the glass noodles...
Time to dig in
This is so good...

It tastes like gamjatang broth
mixed with gopchang hot pot
Perilla powder and leaves... It smells incredible
They usually make the sauce for you,
but I'm not into chili flavor,
so I made my own
Gonna mix this up
This is the sauce
This one's a win!!
When I first came in, I smelled a bit of pork and thought,
"What if it smells too gamey?"
It doesn't smell at all, just rich and savory...!!
It's not just that there's no smell,
it's seriously savory
The texture is like...
It's kind of between soft and chewy...?

It's so good, gotta try the soondae too
This is Soondae Town, after all...
It's so good, what am I gonna do...?
There's absolutely no gamey smell, and it's perfectly chewy
(Owner's recommendation) He said glass noodles first, then chewy noodles, then ramyeon
But I haven't finished the chewy noodles yet,
so I'm gonna eat fast before the ramyeon gets soggy
Let me try it like this
Where does it all go when you're so skinny...?
It's crazy how you don't gain weight eating like that
(I wonder that too, haha) I know, right?
(Picking out the noodles before they get soggy)
I just pulled out all the chewy and glass noodles
Felt like they were about to get too soft
The chewy noodles are so good even when they're soggy
They get nice and tender

The soondae filling...
It falls apart...!
The glass noodles are melting in my mouth...
The slushy is free?!
(Anyone can grab one) (Can't pass up a free slushy...)
This is what I love about markets
The generosity
Slushys go for 3,000 won these days... And it's free here?
The gopchang's super clean
There is no grease,
no mush,
just that perfect chew
(Hot pot → Stir-fry) It ends up like a stir-fry at the end!!
Portion's a little small… Should I get more?
I'll refill the broth
and order extra ramyeon

But I want to add
a lot of ramyeon,
(Normally it's free!) so I'll just pay for the extras!
More and more people are showing up
(Finally added the ramyeon...!)
Thank you
(Better eat quick while the ramyeon cooks)
Undercooked ramyeon is tastier
(Gonna eat it now) when you're eating it in a hot pot
Now's exactly the time...!
Whoa, this broth is insane
It's so good
(Cause it's not spicy) At first, it was kinda mild and not spicy at all,
so it felt a bit like gamjatang
But now it tastes exactly like pork gopchang hot pot
You're the first person

in our history
to eat four servings alone...!
Our four servings aren't like other places...
She's not an average customer...!
You added three more packs of ramyeon?
(Respect)
Not an average customer...!
Legendary...!
These days,
stir-fried gopchang tends to be
super slick and mushy
But market gopchang really hits different
The texture too,
it's like they removed the insides and just left the outer layer
So it feels a bit firmer
Have you ever tried soondae skewers?

Me...?
Of course I have
They're different in every neighborhood...!
Really? What kind did you have?
Some places deep-fry the skewers,
- kinda like corn dogs... - (Wait, what...?)
I've literally never seen that in my life
What generation are you even from?
I should try making those at home sometime
(This subscriber didn't want to disturb us..!!) This is such an honor
(This subscriber didn't want to disturb us..!!) I'm the one who's honored, thank you
- Please eat a lot - Thank you
- It's truly an honor - Thank you
- Did you get your wish? - Yeah I did, fighting!!
He's been buzzing since he got here
I love how it changes from a hot pot to a stir-fry

It gets super rich at the end
You're so skinny, where does it all go...?
I know, right?
I wanna get the fried rice to-go
instead of eating it here
I wanna eat more,
but it's almost rush hour...
I can pack it for you,
no problem, haha
Everything gets packed to go... except me, haha
(Taking the fried rice to go so we don't take up space!) That works, thank you
I put my whole soul into this, haha
Thanks so much
Let me press it down a bit...
Just gonna take one bite!
(It's hot...)

(But so good)
This must be amazing...
Tzuyang has 13 million subscribers
I saw your Indonesia tour videos
We can't eat like that (?)
How do you manage all that food?
- She's Tzuyang...! - This is seriously so good
- I was the only one who didn’t know...? - Not eating this should be a crime
You really didn't know? Haha
That was incredible
Where does it all go?
Three people usually split two servings,
but you ate four alone...
I thought more people were coming
Wait, how many packs of ramyeon??
Twenty, haha

- (Have some tangerines) - Thank you
- I saw a fruit stand, so... haha - They look so good
I went light today, more of a snack vibe
Must be the market vibe...
I even got tangerines, hehe
The vendors were so kind,
the atmosphere was great,
and the food was honestly amazing
This spot was great,
but there are more soondae places around here too
If you're at Suwon's Jidong Market,
definitely check out Soondae Town
Ah...
I'm already excited to eat the fried rice at home LOL
Once again,
I enjoyed today's meal!
